subcodes.first_line: The Command hath come, the Decree hath been manifested, and the Herald hath proclaimed before the faces of all servants: "The Kingdom belongeth unto God, the Possessor of Creation!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الامر و ظهر الحکم و نادی المناد امام وجوه العباد الملک لله مالک الایجاد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for assistance; intercession
